summary: Set 065 Session 3 of 3 (FINAL): synthesis proposal. Consolidated S1 bake-off + S2 spike + the pre-065 gpt-5.4/gemini-2.5-pro consensus into one rubric-scored, cross-provider-VERIFIED proposal at docs/proposals/2026-06-14-verification-surface-empirics/ (proposal.md + consensus-journal.md). Recommendations, each scored against the complexity/quality rubric: (a) ADOPT Path-Aware Critique as a tier-orthogonal per-set attribute none|advisory|required, multi-provider, end-of-set, blast-radius-gated; (b) KEEP per-session routed verification unchanged for now (cadence defense plausible but unmeasured) -- demote/retire decision DEFERRED to the forward A/B (Experiments A capability + B cadence); (c) ADOPT manual-now->automated-later, phased, first-party tool-loop adapter primary + Copilot CLI alternative; (d) ADOPT pre-registered falsifiers (~92% probeable share) and a contract-test/CDC gate for fully-encodable functionality with the three hole-fixes, REJECT working-agent per-claim mid-session falsifier authoring. OPEN QUESTION RESOLVED (blast-radius-gated, corroborated by routed gemini-pro analysis $0.0101): same-agent may author falsifiers/contract AND implement for low-blast-radius/probeable work under strict temporal-separation + immutability; independence MANDATORY for high-blast-radius/cross-artifact/ambiguous-novel work. UNIFYING RULE: one core blast-radius predicate (P_task for delegation-mode + author-independence; P_set=any(P_task) for the set-level required gate) plus a named heuristic extension (ambiguity/novelty) for author-independence only. Research/proposal set: NO production code, NO release. VERIFICATION: gpt-5.4 cross-provider, R1 ISSUES_FOUND (5 Major + 1 Minor, all consistency/calibration) -> R2 (3 residual) -> R3 (1 residual) -> R4 VERIFIED, no new inconsistency. Verify spend $0.169+$0.127+$0.100+$0.049=$0.445; open-q $0.0101; next-set $0.0033.
